task_completion.description: Format the title as centered Heading 1 and subtitle as centered and italicized
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for 'Harmony Health Quarterly' centered at the top in a large Heading 1 style, and 'Your Guide to Living Well with Type 2 Diabetes — Spring 2024' directly below it, centered and italicized.

task_completion.description: Format the body into two columns separated from the header by a continuous section break
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the main text of the newsletter arranged in two columns. The title and subtitle at the top must remain in a single column spanning the full width of the page, which visually confirms the presence of a section break.

task_completion.description: Apply Heading 2 style to the four article titles
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the headings 'Understanding Your Blood Sugar Numbers', 'Heart-Healthy Eating on a Budget', 'Staying Active: Exercise Tips for Every Ability Level', and 'Know Your Medications' formatted distinctly as Heading 2 (typically larger and bolder than body text).

task_completion.description: Apply bold and italic formatting to specific paragraphs
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the paragraph starting 'Small changes today...' to be both bold and italicized. Look for the final contact paragraph starting 'Harmony Community Health Center...' to be bold.

task_completion.description: Include a centered footer with the organization's contact information
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look at the bottom margin of the pages for a centered footer containing exactly: 'Harmony Community Health Center — (555) 234-5678 — www.harmonychc.org'.

task_completion.description: Save the formatted document as diabetes_newsletter.docx
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look at the word processor's title bar or a file manager window to verify the file is named 'diabetes_newsletter.docx' and saved in the '/home/ga/Documents/' directory.

integrity.description: The agent used a word processor GUI (like LibreOffice Writer) to format the document
integrity.visual_evidence: Look for screenshots showing the LibreOffice Writer interface with the document open, rather than terminal windows or text editors.

integrity.description: The agent interacted with formatting menus and dialogs
integrity.visual_evidence: Look for open dialog boxes for columns, styles, paragraph formatting, or page styles during the trajectory.

integrity.description: The agent did not use terminal scripts to bypass manual formatting
integrity.visual_evidence: Ensure there are no terminal windows showing Python scripts (e.g., using python-docx) being executed to create or format the output file.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The draft document is located at /home/ga/Documents/diabetes_newsletter_draft.docx and the final output must be saved to /home/ga/Documents/diabetes_newsletter.docx. The document must contain at least 2 sections to support the mixed single-column header and two-column body layout. The expected Heading 2 titles are: 'Understanding Your Blood Sugar Numbers', 'Heart-Healthy Eating on a Budget', 'Staying Active: Exercise Tips for Every Ability Level', and 'Know Your Medications'. The expected footer text is 'Harmony Community Health Center — (555) 234-5678 — www.harmonychc.org'.
